name: Old Fashioned Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and brown sugar in a bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Blend in mashed sweet potatoes and eggs.
3. Add the next four ingredients (corn syrup, milk, salt, vanilla extract) and mix well.
4. Pour the mixture into the pre-baked pie shell.
5. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to 325°F and bake for 35 to 45 minutes longer or until set.
7. Yield: 6 servings.
